name: monkez-file-manager-root
description: Root package for Monkez File Manager

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.test: npm run test --prefix backend && npm run test --prefix frontend
scripts.package: npm run build:frontend && npx pkg backend --out-path dist
scripts.package:electron: npm run build:frontend && npx electron-packager . "Monkez File Manager" --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=dist-electron-release --icon=icon.ico --overwrite --prune=true --ignore="^/(dist|dist-electron|dist-electron-release.*|\.git|\.gitignore|scratch|docs|build|frontend/(node_modules|src|tests|public|\.gitignore|package\.json|package-lock\.json|README\.md|eslint\.config\.js|vite\.config\.js|index\.html)|backend/(node_modules|tests|package\.json|package-lock\.json)|.*\.bat|test_icon\.js|rule\.md|packaged_.*\.log)($|/)"
